channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Mother faces charges after her unlicensed teenage son critically injures 81-year-old Vietnam veteran on e-motorcycle
item.description: In Lake Forest, California, an 81-year-old Vietnam veteran and substitute teacher, Ed Ashman, was critically injured by a teenager riding an e-motorcycle. The teen, whose mother had previously been wa...

item.title: Spotlight: New film releases and movie highlights this week
item.description: This week’s Spotlight offers a roundup of notable new film releases and entertainment highlights across South Africa. At cinemas now, 'Mother Mary' presents a bold, haunting story about a pop star con...

item.title: NBA partners with TECH Global University to offer specialised online sports education programmes
item.description: The National Basketball Association (NBA) has entered into a multi-year partnership with TECH Global University, officially naming it as the league’s online university. Through this agreement, the two...

item.title: Coventry Chairman Says Lampard Happy At Club Despite Chelsea Rumours
item.description: Coventry City chairman Doug King don tell fans make dem no worry about all those talks wey dey link their head coach Frank Lampard back to Chelsea. Lampard, wey don lead Coventry Sky Blues back to Pre...

item.title: KWG and Visa introduce digital payment system to improve hospitality sector payments in Tanzania
item.description: Kalito’s Way Group (KWG) has partnered with Visa to implement a new digital payment system aimed at transforming the food and entertainment industry in Tanzania. The system is already operational at s...

item.title: Trump suggests King Charles’s US visit may help ease tensions with UK government
item.description: Donald Trump has indicated that the forthcoming state visit of King Charles III and Queen Camilla to the United States could play a significant role in improving strained relations between Washington ...

item.title: Jia de Guzman helps lead Creamline back to the top in PVL
item.description: After a series of challenges, Jia de Guzman and the Creamline Cool Smashers have managed to find their way back to the top of the Premier Volleyball League standings. The team, led by the talented set...

item.title: Conservative PACs Target Republicans Supporting Bipartisan Dignity Act
item.description: Rival political action committees (PACs) aligned with conservative factions are gearing up to challenge Republican lawmakers who have cosponsored the Dignity Act, a bipartisan immigration reform bill....

item.title: Pope Leo condemns violence against protesters in Iran, opposes war involvement
item.description: On April 23, 2026, Pope Leo XIV made a significant statement denouncing the Iranian regime’s violence against protesters, urging an end to the killings. In his remarks, he expressed deep concern over ...

item.title: Canada's Small Modular Nuclear Reactors: A 2026 Progress Review
item.description: In 2018, Canada laid out a strategic roadmap to develop small modular reactors (SMRs), which are designed to generate up to 300 megawatts of electricity, significantly smaller than existing CANDU reac...

item.title: States raise concerns over funding burden from proposed NDIS reforms
item.description: Australian state and territory leaders are voicing strong concerns about proposed changes to the National Disability Insurance Scheme (NDIS), following comments by Federal Health Minister Mark Butler ...

item.title: Rosemarie Milsom appointed director to revive Adelaide Writers’ Week after 2026 turmoil
item.description: Rosemarie Milsom, founder and director of the Newcastle Writers Festival, has been appointed as the new director of Adelaide Writers’ Week (AWW) following the festival's 2026 crisis. The controversy e...

item.title: Nashik-Based Self-Styled Godman Accused of Rape and Threatening Woman with Divine Power
item.description: In Nashik, a self-proclaimed godman, Maheshgiri alias Mahesh Dilip Kakde, has been accused of raping a 28-year-old woman in 2024. The woman, who was dealing with mental stress, had been taken to Kakde...

item.title: Tanzanite Queens name 27-player squad for crucial World Cup qualifiers against Cameroon
item.description: The Tanzania U-20 women’s national team, popularly known as the Tanzanite Queens, are preparing for an important 2026 FIFA Women’s World Cup qualifying tie against Cameroon. Head coach Bakari Shime ha...

item.title: UK-funded migrant detention centre in France to open with limited capacity after three-year delay
item.description: A new detention centre for migrants attempting to cross the English Channel in small boats is set to be built in Dunkirk, three years after it was first proposed under a UK-France agreement. Funded by...

item.title: KWS Directed to Release Snakebite Fatality Data Following Ombudsman Ruling
item.description: The Director General of the Kenya Wildlife Service (KWS), Erustus Kanga, is under threat of criminal prosecution after failing to release data on snakebite-related deaths. The Commission on Administra...

item.title: Study shows high levels of antibiotic resistance in Tanzanian hospitals
item.description: A new comprehensive study has highlighted a serious rise in antimicrobial resistance (AMR) across Tanzania, causing alarm among health experts. The research, led by Charles Basil Kafaiya at the Nation...

item.title: Stella struggles with fear as conflicts escalate with Vincent's pressures | Episode 27
item.description: In Episode 27 of 'The Alibi,' viewers witness Stella dealing with intense fear as she and her family face growing pressure from Vincent. The episode explores the mounting tension and emotional strain ...

item.title: Kano Assembly Screens Deputy Governor Nominee Murtala Sule Garo
item.description: On Thursday, political leaders and stakeholders from the All Progressives Congress (APC) gathered at the Kano State House of Assembly as Murtala Sule Garo appeared for screening as the deputy governor...

item.title: Nigeria improves aviation safety score to 91.45% after ICAO validation audit
item.description: Nigeria aviation sector don show strong improvement as the country record 91.45 percent Effective Implementation score during the International Civil Aviation Organization (ICAO) Coordinated Validatio...
